# Book Nova

> Personal library management mobile app for iOS and Android.
> Measure your reading by stacking your books — beat a chihuahua, then a flamingo, then your own height.

## Language versions

- English (this page): https://book-nova.com/en/llms.txt
- Français: https://book-nova.com/llms.txt
- Español: https://book-nova.com/es/llms.txt

## About

Book Nova is a reading app created by Ana and Florent, two reading enthusiasts based in Paris, France. The app lets you scan, organize and track your book collection with a unique concept: every finished book stacks into a virtual pile whose height is compared to fun benchmarks (animals, objects, your own height).

## Key features

- Smart library management (ISBN scan, manual entry)
- Badge system and progression (100+ badges)
- Reading tracking with detailed statistics
- Book lending and borrowing management
- Discover new books
- Data export and import (since v1.11.4)
- Available in French, English, and Spanish

## Pricing

- Free plan: 4 books added per day, 150 books total, 3 concurrent loans
- Premium plan: unlimited

## Store ratings

- App Store: 4.7/5 (184 reviews)
- Google Play: 4.5/5 (404 reviews)
